title: Make any mob fight for you by taking their souls.
description: Add a new weapon to the game, allows you to Extract the soul of any mob and summon them
body:
_**Soul extraction device**_
![soul extraction device](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a28a3871de885ea78bfef5bb8de723fa99412561.png)

Can be easily crafted by a redstone dust + iron hoe.

If this weapon kills any mob as a final hit, it will dorp a soalberry.

(this feature works for any mods even booses)

**_Soalberry_**
![soalberry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/293bb6e9614137340b791fe113fa39bc70c503fe_0.webp)

Right click with soalberry well summon a copy of that mob. they well follow you and fight for you.

Right click the summoned mob with Soul extracction device, well turn them back to soalberry, the health well not be reset(to keep things balance）

If you want to get rid of them, you can also press Shift + right click to eat the soalberry, also gives you some special effects.

**_More information_**

This mod I made for myself to have some cool mob creatures to fight for me.

I tried to make it as balanced and easy to use as possible (you have to defeat the mob first)

You can't attack your summoned objects (it has been disabled). Because some mods may have issues with their ai and crash your game 

(don't worry I tested with a lot of mods and it's stable now). But I still recommend that you try it first with the new creative world.

Some mod creatures won't fight for you, but you can still turn them into soalberries

I actually don't own the textures in this mod. If there are any issues with copy rights, I will remove the mod.

This is my first mod, there may be many shortcomings. But i like it.

just find out I spell every "soul" to "soal" in this mod.... don't mind
